footer.tagline: Real estate platform connecting you directly to property owners

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: Please read the following disclaimer carefully before using the Btlee platform. By using the platform, you acknowledge your agreement to its terms.
disclaimer.highlight: Btlee is only a listing medium that connects property owners directly with interested users — it is not a party to any deal. All transactions take place between users and at their sole responsibility.

sections.title: Nature of the platform
sections.body: Btlee is an online real estate platform that lets property owners publish their listings and communicate directly with interested users, without any intermediary. The platform is not a real estate broker or agent and is not a party to any deal between users; its role is limited to displaying the listings that users themselves post.

sections.title: No responsibility for transactions
sections.body: Btlee is not responsible for any financial, administrative, or commercial transactions between users — whether between an owner and a buyer, an owner and a tenant, or any other parties. Any agreement, contract, or payment is the sole responsibility of the parties involved.

sections.title: Accuracy of information
sections.body: All listing data (price, area, location, images, description, and contact method) is entered by the advertisers themselves. Btlee does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of this data, and users must verify it independently before making any decision or payment.

sections.title: Inspection and verification
sections.body: We advise users to inspect the property in person and to verify the ownership documents and the identity and details of the other party before signing any contract or paying any deposit.

sections.title: Payments and fraud
sections.body: Btlee does not receive or mediate any payments between users. Do not pay any amount before fully verifying the property and the other party. The platform is not liable for any loss resulting from fraud or scams, and we urge you to be cautious and to report any suspicious listing.

sections.title: Responsibility for posted content
sections.body: Advertisers are solely and fully responsible for the legality and accuracy of the content they publish. Btlee may remove any listing that violates these terms or the law without prior notice, but is not responsible for content posted by users.

sections.title: No warranty
sections.body: Btlee does not endorse or recommend any specific property or advertiser, and provides no warranty regarding a property's condition, legal status, or fitness for any particular purpose.

sections.title: Third parties
sections.body: The platform may contain contact methods or links to third parties (such as WhatsApp). Btlee is not responsible for the services or content of any third party.

sections.title: Changes to this disclaimer
sections.body: Btlee may amend or update this disclaimer at any time. Your continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the updated version.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information Btlee collects, how we use it, and your rights. By using the platform you agree to this policy.
privacy.highlight: We only collect the data needed to run the platform and connect you with property owners. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: When you create an account we collect your name, email address, and/or phone number, and any property listings you publish (including images, price, location, and a contact number). If you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email, and profile picture from Google — nothing else. We do not access your contacts, posts, or friends list.

sections.title: Social sign-in (Google)
sections.body: Signing in with Google is optional and only used to authenticate you and create your account. We request the basic profile and email scopes only. We do not post anything on your behalf and do not store your Google password.

sections.title: How we use your data
sections.body: We use your data to: create and secure your account, publish your listings, let interested users contact you, send service-related emails (such as password reset), and improve the platform. Your phone/WhatsApp number is shown on your own listings so buyers can reach you directly.

sections.title: Data sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal data. Contact details you choose to publish on a listing are visible to other users by design. We use trusted service providers (e.g. cloud hosting and image storage) solely to operate the platform.

sections.title: Cookies & sessions
sections.body: We use secure, httpOnly cookies to keep you signed in. These are essential for authentication and are not used for advertising or cross-site tracking.

sections.title: Data retention & deletion
sections.body: We keep your data while your account is active. You can delete your account and associated data at any time — see our Data Deletion page for instructions.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You may access, correct, or delete your personal data, and withdraw consent for social sign-in at any time by contacting us or deleting your account.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

privacy.contactBody: For any privacy questions or data requests, reach us on WhatsApp at +20 107 001 0209 or +20 101 006 0446.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
dataDeletion.intro: You can delete your Btlee account and all associated data at any time. Here's how:
steps: Sign in to your Btlee account.
Go to your Profile / Account settings.
Alternatively, message us on WhatsApp at +20 107 001 0209 or +20 101 006 0446 with the email or phone number on your account and request deletion.
dataDeletion.note: Once confirmed, your account, listings, and personal data are permanently removed from our systems. Data shared via third parties (e.g. Google) is also disconnected.
